description: Spill 1 performance budget — refresh with `npm run perf:baseline` after an intentional change. Reviewers must check the `current` diff carefully; see scripts/performance-budget/README.md for the review protocol.
_note: Re-baselined 2026-04-25 after refactor/consolidate-pixi-preview consolidated preview.html from 5 concurrent Pixi.Applications down to a single-active-application pattern (only one ticker / canvas alive at a time). Aggregate `rafCallsPerSec` dropped ~3-5x (idle: 220→110, buy_popup: 360→103, during_draw: 420→163 on 120Hz dev display; expect ~half on 60Hz CI). `max` values now carry ~1.5x headroom over the new dev `current` values to tolerate both CI variance and high-refresh dev measurements; previous baselines reserved ~2x for the noisier 5-app aggregate.
